name: Annexin V / PI Apoptosis Assay
nameCn: Annexin V / PI 凋亡检测

components.name: 4. Add 5 µL FITC-Annexin V + 5 µL PI
7. Analyze by flow cytometry within 1 h

notes.en: AV⁻/PI⁻=live; AV⁺/PI⁻=early apoptosis; AV⁺/PI⁺=late apoptosis; AV⁻/PI⁺=necrosis. CaCl₂ essential. Positive control: staurosporine 1 µM 6 h.
notes.zh: AV⁻/PI⁻=活；AV⁺/PI⁻=早期凋亡；AV⁺/PI⁺=晚期凋亡；AV⁻/PI⁺=坏死。需含 CaCl₂。阳性对照：星形孢菌素 1 µM 6 h。

ref: Vermes et al. (1995) J Immunol Methods 184:39

materials.name: Annexin V-FITC or Annexin V-APC conjugate
Annexin V binding buffer (10 mM HEPES, 140 mM NaCl, 2.5 mM CaCl₂)

note.en: Cells remain in apoptosis-inducing treatment for the required duration (6–72 h depending on agent); plan staining the next morning if using overnight treatment
note.zh: 细胞在凋亡诱导处理中保留所需时长（6–72 h，取决于试剂）；过夜处理时可次日早上再染色

usage.en: Detect early and late apoptosis by Annexin V/PI staining and flow cytometry.
usage.zh: 通过 Annexin V/PI 染色和流式细胞术检测早期和晚期凋亡。
